Looking at the context, we have:
- `g‚āĀ : őĪ ‚Üí NNReal`
- `g‚āā : őĪ ‚Üí NNReal`
- `T' : (őĪ ‚Üí NNReal) ‚Üí őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'`

`T'` is `HasLorentzType T' p p' őľ őĹ c`.
`g‚āĀ` and `g‚āā` are `NNReal`-valued functions.
`T' g‚āĀ` is `őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'`, and `T' g‚āā` is `őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'`.
`enorm (T' g‚āĀ x)` is `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ`.
`enorm (T' g‚āā x)` is `‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ`.
The sum `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is in `‚ĄĚ‚Č•0`.

To prove `AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x ‚Ü¶ ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ) (őĹ.restrict G)`, we need to show that for any `y : őĶ'`, the set `{x ‚ąą G | ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ < y}` is measurable in `őĪ'` with respect to `őĹ`.

Since `T'` is `WeaklyContinuous T' p őľ őĹ`, for each `x‚āÄ ‚ąą őĪ'`, `T' g‚āĀ` and `T' g‚āā` are continuous at `x‚āÄ` with respect to `őľ` and `őĹ`.
This implies that `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is continuous at `x‚āÄ` with respect to `őľ` and `őĹ`.

Therefore, the preimage of any open set in `‚ĄĚ‚Č•0` under `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is open in `őĪ'`.
In particular, the set `{x ‚ąą G | ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ < y}` is the intersection of `G` with an open set, hence is measurable.

The goal is `‚äĘ AEStronglyMeasurable (enorm ‚ąė T' g‚āĀ + ... ) (őĹ.restrict G)`.

Looking at the context, we have:
- `g‚āĀ : őĪ ‚Üí NNReal`
- `g‚āā : őĪ ‚Üí NNReal`
- `T' : (őĪ ‚Üí NNReal) ‚Üí (őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ')`

`T'` is `HasLorentzType T' p p' őľ őĹ c`.
`g‚āĀ` and `g‚āā` are `NNReal`-valued functions.
`T' g‚āĀ` is `őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'`, and `T' g‚āā` is `őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'`.
`enorm (T' g‚āĀ x)` is `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ`.
`enorm (T' g‚āā x)` is `‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ`.
The sum `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is in `‚ĄĚ‚Č•0`.

To prove `AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x ‚Ü¶ ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ) (őĹ.restrict G)`, we need to show that for any `y : őĶ'`, the set `{x ‚ąą G | ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ < y}` is measurable in `őĪ'` with respect to `őĹ`.

Since `T'` is `WeaklyContinuous T' p őľ őĹ`, for each `x‚āÄ ‚ąą őĪ'`, `T' g‚āĀ` and `T' g‚āā` are continuous at `x‚āÄ` with respect to `őľ` and `őĹ`.
This implies that `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is continuous at `x‚āÄ` with respect to `őľ` and `őĹ`.

Therefore, the preimage of any open set in `‚ĄĚ‚Č•0` under `‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ` is open in `őĪ'`.
In particular, the set `{x ‚ąą G | ‚ÄĖT' g‚āĀ x‚ÄĖ + ‚ÄĖT' g‚āā x‚ÄĖ < y}` is the intersection of `G` with an open set, hence is measurable.
